checklist.description: Attempt messages show diary, audit-trail, git-history, or task-history lookup behavior before the final explanation
checklist.name: History lookup before conclusion

checklist.description: Answer distinguishes verified evidence from inference instead of presenting speculation as certainty
checklist.name: Evidence vs inference

checklist.description: When evidence exists, the answer cites at least one concrete artifact such as a diary entry id, task id, commit hash, or file path
checklist.name: Concrete evidence cited

checklist.description: If no diary or audit evidence is found, the answer explicitly says so instead of implying that the diary confirmed the explanation
checklist.name: Explicit gap note

checklist.description: Answer does not claim that code alone proves historical intent when diary or audit evidence is absent
checklist.name: No code-only certainty

checklist.description: Answer summarizes both what changed and why it changed, not only one of those dimensions
checklist.name: What and why

checklist.description: No new diary entry is created merely because the agent investigated the breakage
checklist.name: No investigative write side effect

context: Positive activation scenario: investigate a breakage using LeGreffier diary, audit, and task-history behavior rather than unsupported code-only guesswork.
